basicInfo.name: Clemyth
basicInfo.flavor: Clemyth became the final member of the Pentagon on the condition that it would not interfere with her independent activities. Upon completing the Staff of Providence after years of research, she now seeks the Land of Non-Existence once again.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 65% of Magic Attack plus 14% of the caster's Max HP 1 time(s).
 - Ally with Lowest Current HP (Excluding Self)
 - Grants a Barrier equal to 15% of the caster's Max HP. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 65% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Perfect Trap
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 30% of Magic Attack plus 7% of the caster's Max HP 1 time(s).
 - All Allies
 - Grants Continuous Healing. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Effect Resist Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Incoming Healing Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 30% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Defiance of Nature
Skill 2.desc:
Allies (Attack, Magic)
 - Grants Crit Damage Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Allies (Defense, Support)
 - Grants Defense Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Allies (Universal)
 - Grants Damage Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Effect Hit Rate Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - All Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Damage Reduction [Duration: 4 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Defense Reduction to 0%.
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Allies (Attack, Magic)
 - Increases Turns: Crit Damage Boost duration becomes 4 turn(s).
 - Allies (Defense, Support)
 - Increases Turns: Defense Boost duration becomes 4 turn(s).
 - Allies (Universal)
 - Increases Turns: Damage Boost duration becomes 4 turn(s).
 - Increases Turns: Effect Hit Rate Boost duration becomes 4 turn(s).

Passive.name: Extraordinary Intellect
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Max HP-Based Block Rate Boost. [Always Active]
 - Revives with 100% HP upon falling in battle. [Once per Battle]
 - Grants Ally Role Support. [Always Active]
 - All Enemies
 - Inflicts All Attack Reduction. [Always Active]
 - All Allies
 - Grants Continuous Healing upon activating a skill 1 time(s). [Duration: 1 Turn(s)]
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - Self
 - Adds Effect: Grants All Damage Immunity upon revival. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]

Awaken Skill.name: Power of Salvation
Awaken Skill.desc:
2 Allies
 - Revives the fallen target with Immortality if target type is Attack or Magic. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Revives the fallen target with Immortality if target type is Attack or Magic. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Crowd Control Immunity upon gaining Immortality. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Revives the fallen target with 65% HP if target type is Defense, Support, or Universal.
 - Grants Crowd Control Immunity upon Revival. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - All Allies
 - Heals HP equal to 26% of the caster's Max HP.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - 2 Allies
 - Increases Turns: Immortality duration becomes 3 turn(s).

profile.likes: Aris, Zahara, her own homemade Asgar-style stew, rare experimental ingredients, the color brown
profile.dislikes: Orkah, various dried foods, vainglorious people, evil, the color gray
profile.story: Clemyth became the final member of the Pentagon on the condition that it would not interfere with her independent activities. Upon completing the Staff of Providence after years of research, she now seeks the Land of Non-Existence once again.

basicInfo.name: Clemyth
basicInfo.flavor: After much persuasion from her former colleagues, Clemyth agreed to take command of an organization of explorers and artisans known as the \"Primordial Pull.\" She is a friend of Aris's mother, a connection that reawakens her long-buried longing for her lost son.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 50% of Magic Attack plus 12% of the caster's Max HP 1 time(s).
 - Ally with Lowest Current HP (Excluding Self)
 - Grants a Barrier equal to 14% of the caster's Max HP. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Single Enemy
 - Increases Damage: To 60% of Magic Attack plus 14% of the caster's Max HP.
 - Ally with Lowest Current HP (Excluding Self)
 - Increases Effect: Barrier absorption becomes 15% of Max HP.

Skill 1.name: Perfect Trap
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 30% of Magic Attack plus 7% of the caster's Max HP 1 time(s).
 - All Allies
 - Grants Continuous Healing. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Continuous Healing. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Effect Resist Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Incoming Healing Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - All Allies
 - Increases Turns: Continuous Healing duration becomes 3 turn(s).

Skill 2.name: Defiance of Nature
Skill 2.desc:
Allies (Attack, Magic)
 - Grants Crit Damage Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Allies (Defense, Support)
 - Grants Defense Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Allies (Universal)
 - Grants Damage Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Effect Hit Rate Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - All Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Damage Reduction [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Allies (Attack, Magic)
 - Increases Effect: Crit Damage Boost to 49%.
 - Allies (Defense, Support)
 - Increases Effect: Defense Boost to 39%.
 - Allies (Universal)
 - Increases Effect: Damage Boost to 20%.
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Allies (Attack, Magic)
 - Increases Turns: Crit Damage Boost duration becomes 4 turn(s).
 - Allies (Defense, Support)
 - Increases Turns: Defense Boost duration becomes 4 turn(s).
 - Allies (Universal)
 - Increases Turns: Damage Boost duration becomes 4 turn(s).
 - Increases Turns: Effect Hit Rate Boost duration becomes 4 turn(s).

Passive.name: Extraordinary Intellect
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Max HP-Based Block Rate Boost. [Always Active]
 - Revives with 80% HP upon falling in battle. [Once per Battle]
 - Grants Ally Role Support. [Always Active]
 - All Enemies
 - Inflicts All Attack Reduction. [Always Active]
 - All Allies
 - Grants Continuous Healing upon activating a skill 1 time(s). [Duration: 1 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Self
 - Increases Effect: Max HP-Based Block Rate Boost max increases to 33%.
 - All Enemies
 - Increases Effect: All Attack Reduction to 16%.
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - Self
 - Adds Effect: Grants All Damage Immunity upon revival. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]

transcendence.transcend_7: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_8: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.

basicInfo.name: Clemyth
basicInfo.flavor: Though Clemyth arrived in the Land of Non-Existence, her son went missing, and she herself barely managed to make it out alive. Subsequently, her tale becomes a legend whispered among other explorers.

profile.story: Though Clemyth arrived in the Land of Non-Existence, her son went missing, and she herself barely managed to make it out alive. Subsequently, her tale becomes a legend whispered among other explorers.

basicInfo.name: Clemyth
basicInfo.flavor: Clemyth is an explorer hailing from a tribe of spellweavers in the Blazing Desert, and she is well known for the various tools and inventions she has crafted using her exceptional intellect. In the hopes of healing her husband's incurable illness, she sets out in search of the Land of Non-Existence with her son.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 40% of Magic Attack plus 10% of the caster's Max HP 1 time(s).
 - Ally with Lowest Current HP (Excluding Self)

Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 40% of Physical Attack.
